title: lobelia assurgens
intro: Lobelia assurgens, also known as Indian tobacco, is a plant species belonging to the Lobelia genus, native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and antispasmodic effects, which help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lobelia assurgens include reducing inflammation, lowering blood pressure, and acting as a natural detoxifier. Herbal preparations of Lobelia assurgens are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or mixing them with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions.
